overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying vehicle passing over a dark hillside with a neon-lit futuristic city in the background. The camera pans across the foggy landscape as a restricted area warning briefly appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city outskirts with airborne traffic

events.description: flying vehicle exits the frame to the upper right

agents.ego_description: stationary observer watching the flying vehicle pass overhead from left to right

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car with illuminated undercarriage flying across the sky from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with neon lights and holographic advertisements
dark earthen hill in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark hillside overlooking a neon-lit futuristic city at night. A flying vehicle with bright undercarriage lights passes overhead from left to right, silhouetted against the foggy sky above the skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark hillside with distant city view

events.description: camera begins panning left across the hillside

agents.ego_description: panning the camera left across the dark hillside, shifting focus away from the city

segments.scene_description: After the vehicle exits the frame, the camera pans left across the dark earthen hillside, causing the city skyline to shift toward the right side of the frame while the mound occupies the center.

events.description: red restricted area warning UI appears briefly at top of screen

agents.ego_description: panning the camera right back toward the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to center the city skyline again. A brief red restricted area warning appears at the top of the screen before disappearing, leaving the view of the neon-lit city against the dark hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a dark, foggy hillside that frames a distant, neon-lit futuristic city. It begins with a flying vehicle gliding from left to right, its bright undercarriage lights cutting through the haze as it silhouettes against the skyscrapers. As the vehicle exits the frame, the camera pans left to bring the earthen mound into the center, shifting the glowing skyline toward the right edge of the view. The scene then pans back to the right to re-center the city skyline, during which a brief red restricted area warning flashes at the top of the screen before vanishing. Finally, the camera settles on the contrast between the dark, silent hillside and the vibrant, shimmering lights of the metropolis.
